prompt: A send-money flow: pick one of my saved payees, enter an amount and a note, review the details, then send it from checking.
wire:
export default function SendMoneyFlow() { const [payees, setPayees] = useState([]); const [accounts, setAccounts] = useState([]); const [step, setStep] = useState("compose"); // compose | review | awaiting | done const [payeeId, setPayeeId] = useState(""); const [amountDollars, setAmountDollars] = useState(""); const [memo, setMemo] = useState(""); const [error, setError] = useState(""); const [result, setResult] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { tools.host_listPayees({}).then((r) => setPayees(r.data ?? r)); tools.host_listAccounts({}).then((r) => setAccounts(r.data ?? r)); }, []); const checking = accounts.find((a) => (a.type ?? a.accountType ?? "").toLowerCase().includes("check") || (a.name ?? "").toLowerCase().includes("check") ) ?? accounts[0]; const selectedPayee = payees.find((p) => String(p.id) === String(payeeId)); const amountCents = Math.round(parseFloat(amountDollars) * 100); const valid = selectedPayee && amountDollars && !isNaN(amountCents) && amountCents > 0; const handleReview = () => { setError(""); if (!selectedPayee) { setError("Please select a payee."); return; } if (!amountDollars || isNaN(amountCents) || amountCents <= 0) { setError("Please enter a valid amount."); return; } setStep("review"); }; const handleSend = async () => { setStep("awaiting"); try { const res = await tools.host_transferMoney({ amount: amountCents, recipient_name: selectedPayee.name, memo: memo || undefined, }); setResult(res); setStep("done"); } catch (e) { setError("Something went wrong. Please try again."); setStep("review"); } }; const reset = () => { setStep("compose"); setPayeeId(""); setAmountDollars(""); setMemo(""); setError(""); setResult(null); }; const labelStyle = { display: "block", fontSize: "13px", color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", marginBottom: "6px", fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", }; const inputStyle = { width: "100%", boxSizing: "border-box", padding: "10px 12px", fontSize: "15px", fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", background: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", outline: "none", }; const fieldStyle = { display: "grid", gap: "6px" }; const btnPrimary = { padding: "12px 24px", background: "var(--vendo-color-accent)", color: "var(--vendo-color-accent-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", fontSize: "15px", fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", fontWeight: 600, cursor: "pointer", width: "100%", }; const btnSecondary = { padding: "12px 24px", background: "transparent", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-small)", fontSize: "15px", fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", fontWeight: 500, cursor: "pointer", width: "100%", }; const surface = { background: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-medium)", padding: "28px 24px", display: "grid", gap: "20px", maxWidth: "480px", margin: "0 auto", fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", }; const rowStyle = { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: "12px" }; const divider = { borderTop: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", margin: "4px 0" }; const reviewRow = { display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", padding: "6px 0" }; const reviewLabel = { fontSize: "14px", color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)" }; const reviewValue = { fontSize: "15px", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", fontWeight: 500 }; if (step === "compose") { return (
Send money
From {checking ? (checking.name ?? "Checking") : "your checking account"} {checking?.balanceCents != null ? ` · ${fmt.money(checking.balanceCents)} available` : ""}
$ setAmountDollars(e.target.value)} style={{ ...inputStyle, paddingLeft: "26px" }} />
